title: Saudi Arabian Pasta with Umami Sauce
description: A flavorful and aromatic pasta dish inspired by the cuisine of Saudi Arabia, featuring a rich umami sauce made with xenial spices.

ingredients.name: Natto
ingredients.notes: optional, add for extra umami flavor

ingredients.name: Xenial spice blend
ingredients.notes: mix of cumin, coriander, and turmeric

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the umami paste and sauté for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the natto (if using), xenial spice blend, and Arabian cinnamon (if using). Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining the spaghetti.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet with the sauce and toss to combine.
If the sauce seems too thick, add a bit of the reserved pasta water.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley (if desired).
